name: blinklean
description: A complete Flutter mobile app for home services including: - **Home Cleaning** (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, Kitchen, Bathroom, Sofa, Carpet, Office) - **Vehicle Care** (Car, Bike, Auto Rickshaw, Bicycle - waterless cleaning) - **Laundry Services** (Wash & Fold, Wash & Iron, Steam Iron, Dry Cleaning) - **Scrap & Recycling** (Paper, Plastic, Metal, E-Waste, Cardboard, Glass)
